S

setStage(Stage) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.MenuController
Stores the primary stage supplied by the application launcher.
setStage(Stage) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
Stores the primary application stage for later scene changes.
setTurnState(boolean) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.PlayerHuman
Activates or completes the human player's turn.
showCardPile() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
Displays the last played card and refreshes the accumulated score.
showHandCardPlayer() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
Displays the current human hand by resolving each card's image resource and attaching its click handler.
showWinner(int) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.FinalController
Updates the result label with the identifier of the winning player.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.GameLauncher
 
startGame() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
Creates the game model, deals the initial cards, renders the starting interface, and launches the turn-management task.
startGame() - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Creates the complete card set, chooses the initial discard, deals the player hands, and initializes the draw deck.
